::: lt-grid
::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Label Right-Angled Triangles
:::
::: lt-desc
Identify and correctly label the hypotenuse, opposite side, and adjacent side relative to a given angle in a right-angled triangle.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Hypotenuse]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Opposite & adjacent]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Angle reference]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Recall the Trigonometric Ratios
:::
::: lt-desc
Define and recall sin θ, cos θ, and tan θ as ratios of sides using SOH-CAH-TOA, and identify the correct ratio for a given problem.
:::
::: lt-skills
[SOH-CAH-TOA]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Ratio selection]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Fraction form]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Find a Missing Side Length
:::
::: lt-desc
Use a trigonometric ratio to set up and solve an equation to find an unknown side length, given one side and one acute angle.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Equation set-up]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Multiply & divide]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Calculator use]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Find a Missing Angle
:::
::: lt-desc
Use inverse trigonometric functions (sin⁻¹, cos⁻¹, tan⁻¹) to find an unknown angle when two sides of a right-angled triangle are known.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Inverse trig]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Two-side ratio]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Degree rounding]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Solve Elevation & Depression Problems
:::
::: lt-desc
Interpret diagrams and written descriptions involving angles of elevation and depression, and apply trigonometry to find distances and heights.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Elevation & depression]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Diagram reading]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Real-world modelling]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT6
:::
::: lt-title
Solve Multi-step Problems
:::
::: lt-desc
Combine two or more trigonometric steps, or integrate trigonometry with other geometric knowledge, to solve complex problems.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Multi-step reasoning]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Combined geometry]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Exact & rounded answers]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::
:::
